title: Fast Life
lyrics:
Yeah, we livin' that fast, that fast life TEST
Yeah, gettin' money, gettin' funny
And havin' funny tricks all the time
I get in, ay, I get in, ay
We didn't even need a rocket for that
I don't even know my name, I wanna run around
I'm about to do it, but I just go that fast life
Every time I get in, I get the ass right
Get the fast life, got the best type
Factor all that, I'm number one man
Killin' what you wanna feel, eat
Pack it down and better be there than me
I got a heater inside, my local tokens
Local keys to take a shot
Get rocked, get rocked
And you know it's the shit that we got
When we're fast livin'
Yeah, fast livin'
Know that you can't get it all
In the fast life, fast type, fast life
I know I can't get it all in one shot
I don't like to do it all
Shut it down, leave it fast
Take the call, take the fall, fuck it all man
Fast, it's the fast life
Live that fast life, fast type, fast life
Man, it's lit like a disaster
Sometimes I take out my pills and wonder what I'm doin'
Sometimes I look it up, a cigarette smoke
He's a villain inside my eyes
Or am I just blind to him for another life?
Or am I just designed him?
I wanna end it too soon
No matter how fast, no matter how soon
No matter how many new nights
I don't want to do the whole thing
If it's the old me comin' there'll be no way
In the fast life, baby
Yeah, don't even wanna hit shit up
It's that fast life, fast life
Fast hype, fast dope, fast
Every world I'm goin' is a girl that's long
And I don't take time
To appreciate the violence
And everything that's gone
I'm blessed beyond, but don't worry
I'm still just okay with the fall
In the fast life, fast life, fast hype, fast
The fast life, fast life, I don't know why
But it's all the same
And it's all your game
Cause I just want you next to me next to it all
So if I gotta come down or if I gotta go faster
It's just the fast life, fast hype, fast
Everything I wanna do, it's my life, my life
Fast life, fast hype, fast
Fast hype, fast dope, fast
Fast hype, fast hype, fast
Every world I'm goin' is a girl that's long
And I don't take time
To appreciate the violence
And everything that's gone
I'm blessed beyond, but don't worry
I'm still just okay with the fall
In the fast life, fast life, fast hype, fast
The fast life, fast hype, I don't know why
But it's all the same
And it's all the more that I need to hear
Cause I need you near
Fast life, fast hype, every night I come around
It's a habit that I want around
I don't care if I gotta go around the world
Nineteen times, just know that I wanna be
Everything you do, in the fastness
In the all new, I know you got
Fast life, fast hype, fast

Fast hype, fast hype, fast
